User.title: User
User.description: A user of the print1.ai Print Processor app.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The profile photo URL of the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

PrintJob.title: Print Job
PrintJob.description: A record of a processed print file.

id.description: The unique ID of the print job. (Optional if using addDoc)

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this job.

fileName.description: The original name of the file.

format.description: The print format used (e.g., A4, Business Card).

/users/{userId}/history/{jobId}.description: A user's history of processed print jobs.
